'''Utharis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Utharis system/Legends|Utharis system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

It was a [[Tarrack]] colony bordering the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] between [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] and [[J't'p'tan]]. The populace tuned in to the [[Utharis GridLink]] for news. [[Starway Services]] was headquartered on Utharis. [[City/Legends|Cities]] included [[Taldaak]], which was served by the local starport, [[Taldaak Station]]. The [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] had a [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] there. The planet was the homeworld of the [[black-winged touret]] and the [[jack-a-dale]].
